/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address,undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/central_alertas.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/central_alertas.dir/alerta.cpp.o CMakeFiles/central_alertas.dir/central.cpp.o CMakeFiles/central_alertas.dir/alertas/alerta_critico.cpp.o CMakeFiles/central_alertas.dir/alertas/alerta_aviso.cpp.o CMakeFiles/central_alertas.dir/alertas/alerta_info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/central_alertas.dir/alertas/alerta_debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/central_alertas.dir/main.cpp.o -o central_alertas
